---
title: "Evidencia1_PlaneacionEstrategica"
output: html_document
date: "2025-05-05"
---

# LIBRERIAS

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(classInt)
library(corrplot)
library(dlookr)
library(dplyr)
library(forecast)
library(foreign)
library(forcats)
library(ggmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(htmltools)
library(jsonlite)
library(knitr)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(leaflet.extras2)
library(leafsync)
library(lubridate)
library(mapview)
library(openxlsx)
library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rgeoda)
library(rlang)
library(scales)
library(sf)
library(SnowballC)
library(sp)
library(spdep)
library(stringr)
library(syuzhet)
library(tigris)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tm)
library(tmap)
library(viridis)
library(wordcloud)
library(wordcloud2)
library(googleway) 
library(readxl)
library(purrr)
library(spatialreg)
library(stargazer)
library(regclass)
library(raster)
library(spgwr)
library(plotly)
```


## Monterrey Capital de Nuevo LeÃ³n
```{r}
ubicacion_monterrey <- data.frame(
  Nombre = "MOnterrey",
  Longitud = -100.3161,
  Latitud = 25.6866
)
icons <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = 'home',
  iconColor = 'white',
  markerColor = 'blue',
  library = 'fa'
)

leaflet(ubicacion_monterrey) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(
    lng = ~Longitud, lat = ~Latitud,
    icon = icons,
    popup = ~Nombre
  )

```

## Los 11 destinos mÃ¡s turÃ­sticos segÃºn Viva Aerobus.
```{r}
destinos <- data.frame(
  Nombre = c(
    "Parque Fundidora",
    "Macroplaza",
    "Paseo Santa LucÃ­a",
    "Mirador del Obispado",
    "Cerro de la Silla",
    "Grutas de GarcÃ­a",
    "Cascada Cola de Caballo",
    "Parque La Huasteca",
    "Nido de los Aguiluchos",
    "Parque EcolÃ³gico Chipinque",
    "Grutas de Bustamante"
  ),
  Latitud = c(
    25.67806,
    25.66861,
    25.66889,
    25.67239,
    25.62306,
    25.84933,
    25.36232,
    25.60900,
    25.65435,
    25.61910,
    26.50056
  ),
  Longitud = c(
    -100.28333,
    -100.30972,
    -100.31000,
    -100.34100,
    -100.24278,
    -100.52389,
    -100.16347,
    -100.50000,
    -100.47032,
    -100.36029,
    -100.52667
  )
)

# Visualiza los destinos en un mapa interactivo
leaflet(destinos) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(
    lng = ~Longitud,
    lat = ~Latitud,
    popup = ~Nombre
  )

```


# BASES DE DATOS
##DF's
```{r}
df1 <-  read_excel('Encuesta_Eventos_Nuevo_Leon.xlsx', sheet= 'Turismo_N.L')
df1 <- df1[, !names(df1) %in% c("AÃ±o", "Mes")]
```


```{r}
df2 <-  read_excel('Encuesta_Eventos_Nuevo_Leon.xlsx', sheet= 'Encuesta_MODECULT_MTY19-24',n_max = 1260)
#df1 <- df1[, !names(df1) %in% c("AÃ±o", "Mes")]
```

```{r}
df3 <-  read_excel('Encuesta_Eventos_Nuevo_Leon.xlsx', sheet= 'Encuesta_PalNorte')
df3 <- df3[, !names(df3) %in% c("Name")]
df3$`Start time` <- as.POSIXct(df3$`Start time`, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
df3$`Completion time` <- as.POSIXct(df3$`Completion time`, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
df3[] <- lapply(df3, function(x) if (is.character(x)) as.factor(x) else x)
```



```{r}
df4 <-  read_excel('Encuesta_Eventos_Nuevo_Leon.xlsx', sheet= 'Turismo_Z.T')
df4$metro <- as.factor(df4$metro)
df4$atraccion_turistica <- as.factor(df4$atraccion_turistica)
```

```{r}
df6 <-  read_excel('Encuesta_Eventos_Nuevo_Leon.xlsx', sheet= 'T_Visitantes_AT_N.L')
df6 <- df6 %>%  filter(AÃ±o %in% c("2019","2020","2021","2022","2023","2024"))
```

```{r}
df7 <-  read_excel('Encuesta_Eventos_Nuevo_Leon.xlsx', sheet= 'Encuesta_Central_AutoBuses')
df7 <- df7[, !names(df7) %in% c("Name")]
df7$`Start time` <- as.POSIXct(df7$`Start time`, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
df7$`Completion time` <- as.POSIXct(df7$`Completion time`, format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
df7[] <- lapply(df7, function(x) if (is.character(x)) as.factor(x) else x)
```


```{r}
df_denue_turismo_CA <- read_sf("INEGI_DENUE_caracteristicas/INEGI_DENUE_19052025.shp", options = "ENCODING=LATIN1")
df_denue_turismo_CO <- read_sf("INEGI_DENUE_conexas/INEGI_DENUE_19052025.shp", options = "ENCODING=LATIN1")
```

#### Mapa Municipios
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df_mx_mun_map <- st_read("mx_maps/mx_mpios/Mexican Municipalities.shp")
nuevo_leon_map <- df_mx_mun_map %>%
  filter(CVE_ENT == 19)
nuevo_leon_map_copia <- nuevo_leon_map
```

```{r}
codelags <- c(2199, 2200, 2201, 2202, 2203, 2204, 2205, 
              2206, 2208, 2211, 2221, 2245)

df_mx_zmm_map <- df_mx_mun_map %>%
  filter(CODELAG %in% codelags)
```


```{r}
mun_glosario <- data.frame(
  CVEGEO = sprintf("190%02d", 1:51),
  NOM_MUN = c(
    "Abasolo", "Agualeguas", "Los Aldamas", "Allende", "AnÃ¡huac", "Apodaca", "Aramberri", "Bustamante",
    "Cadereyta JimÃ©nez", "El Carmen", "Cerralvo", "CiÃ©nega de Flores", "China", "Doctor Arroyo",
    "Doctor Coss", "Doctor GonzÃ¡lez", "Galeana", "GarcÃ­a", "San Pedro Garza GarcÃ­a", "General Bravo",
    "General Escobedo", "General TerÃ¡n", "General TreviÃ±o", "General Zaragoza", "General Zuazua",
    "Guadalupe", "Los Herreras", "Higueras", "Hualahuises", "Iturbide", "JuÃ¡rez", "Lampazos de Naranjo",
    "Linares", "MarÃ­n", "Melchor Ocampo", "Mier y Noriega", "Mina", "Montemorelos", "Monterrey",
    "ParÃ¡s", "PesquerÃ­a", "Los Ramones", "Rayones", "Sabinas Hidalgo", "Salinas Victoria",
    "San NicolÃ¡s de los Garza", "Hidalgo", "Santa Catarina", "Santiago", "Vallecillo", "Villaldama"
  )
)

mun_glosario$CVEGEO <- as.numeric(mun_glosario$CVEGEO)
```

```{r}
nuevo_leon_map <- nuevo_leon_map %>%
  left_join(mun_glosario, by = c("IDUNICO" = "CVEGEO"))
nuevo_leon_map_copia <- nuevo_leon_map_copia %>%
  left_join(mun_glosario, by = c("IDUNICO" = "CVEGEO"))
```

# EDA

## DF1 - Turismo Nuevo LeÃ³n

### Normalidad Turismo Nuevo LeÃ³n
```{r}
df1 %>%
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "valor") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = valor)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "DistribuciÃ³n de Variables NumÃ©ricas", x = "Valor", y = "Frecuencia")
```


```{r}
plot_normality(df1)
```


### Series de Tiempo Turismo Nuevo LeÃ³n
#### Llegada Turistas Nacionales Nuevo LeÃ³n
```{r}
tur_nats <- ts(df1$LLT_nat, start = c(2019), end = c(2024), frequency = 12)
#plot(tur_nats, type = "l", col = "steelblue", lwd = 2, xlab = "Year", ylab = "Turistas Nacionales", main = "Serie de Tiempo Turistas Nacionales Hospedados en Hoteles")
plot(decompose(tur_nats))
```

```{r}
seasonplot(tur_nats,
           col = rainbow(6),
           year.labels = TRUE,
           year.labels.left = TRUE,
           main = "Estacionalidad mensual de turistas nacionales",
           ylab = "Turistas",
           xlab = "Mes",
           season.labels = month.abb)
```

```{r}
ggplot(df1, aes(x = Fecha, y = LLT_nat)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f77b4", size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Turistas Nacionales Hospedados",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2004â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "Miles de Turistas",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60")
  )
```

#### Llegada Turistas Internacionales Nuevo LeÃ³n
```{r}
tur_ints <- ts(df1$LLT_ext, start = c(2019), end = c(2024), frequency = 12)
#plot(tur_ints, type = "l", col = "steelblue", lwd = 2, xlab = "Year", ylab = "Turistas Internacionales", main = "Serie de Tiempo Turistas Extranjeros Hospedados en Hoteles")
plot(decompose(tur_ints))
```

```{r}
seasonplot(tur_ints,
           col = rainbow(6),
           year.labels = TRUE,
           year.labels.left = TRUE,
           main = "Estacionalidad mensual de turistas internacionales",
           ylab = "Turistas",
           xlab = "Mes",
           season.labels = month.abb)
```


```{r}
ggplot(df1, aes(x = Fecha, y = LLT_ext)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f77b4", size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Turistas Internacionales Hospedados",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2004â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "Miles de Turistas",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60")
  )
```
#### OcupaciÃ³n Hotelera Nuevo LeÃ³n
```{r}
df1_long <- df1 %>%
  select(Fecha, CDT, COT) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(CDT, COT), names_to = "tipo", values_to = "turistas")

ggplot(df1_long, aes(x = Fecha, y = turistas, color = tipo)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(CDT = "#1f77b4", COT = "#ff7f0e"),
                     labels = c("Cuartos Disponibles", "Cuartos Ocupados"),
                     name = "") +
  labs(title = "OcupaciÃ³n Cuartos en Nuevo LeÃ³n",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2004â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "Cuartos",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```
#### Derrama EconÃ³mica Nuevo LeÃ³n
```{r}
derrama <- ts(df1$DET, start = c(2019), end = c(2024), frequency = 12)
#plot(derrama, type = "l", col = "steelblue", lwd = 2, xlab = "Year", ylab = "$ Millones de Pesos", main = "Serie de Tiempo Derrama EconÃ³mica")
plot(decompose(derrama))
```

```{r}
seasonplot(derrama,
           col = rainbow(6),
           year.labels = TRUE,
           year.labels.left = TRUE,
           main = "Estacionalidad mensual de la derrama econÃ³mica",
           ylab = "$ Millones de pesos",
           xlab = "Mes",
           season.labels = month.abb)
```


```{r}
ggplot(df1, aes(x = Fecha, y = DET)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f77b4", size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Derrama EconÃ³mica en Nuevo LeÃ³n",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2004â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "Millones de pesos",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60")
  )

```

```{r}
cuartos_ocupados <- ts(df1$COT, start = c(2004), end = c(2024), frequency = 12)
plot(cuartos_ocupados, type = "l", col = "steelblue", lwd = 2, xlab = "Year", ylab = "Cuartos", main = "Serie de Tiempo Cuartos Ocupados")
plot(decompose(cuartos_ocupados))
```

```{r}
ggplot(df1, aes(x = Fecha, y = COT)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f77b4", size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Cuartos Ocupados en Nuevo LeÃ³n",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2004â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "Millones de pesos",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60")
  )

```

```{r}
total_pasajeros <- ts(df1$TPA, start = c(2019), end = c(2024), frequency = 12)
plot(total_pasajeros, type = "l", col = "steelblue", lwd = 2, xlab = "Year", ylab = "Cuartos", main = "Serie de Tiempo Pasajeros en Aeropuertos")
plot(decompose(total_pasajeros))
```

```{r}
seasonplot(total_pasajeros,
           col = rainbow(6),
           year.labels = TRUE,
           year.labels.left = TRUE,
           main = "Estacionalidad mensual de Pasajeros Terminales Aeropuertos",
           ylab = "Miles de Pasajeros",
           xlab = "Mes",
           season.labels = month.abb)
```


```{r}
ggplot(df1, aes(x = Fecha, y = TPA)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f77b4", size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Total Pasajeros Terminales Aeropuerto",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2004â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "Miles de pasajeros",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60")
  )

```

#### CorrelaciÃ³n Variables Turismo Nuevo LeÃ³n
```{r corrplot-basic}
df_num <- df1 %>% dplyr::select(where(is.numeric))
corr_matrix <- cor(df_num, use = "complete.obs")
corrplot(
  corr_matrix,
  method = "color",             
  type = "upper",               
  order = "hclust",              
  col = colorRampPalette(c("red", "white", "steelblue"))(200),
  addCoef.col = "black",         
  tl.col = "black",              
  tl.cex = 0.9,                  
  number.cex = 0.7,             
  diag = FALSE                  
)
```

## DF3 - Festival Pal Norte
### DistribuciÃ³n
```{r}
# 1
ggplot(df3, aes(x = fct_infreq(`Â¿CÃ³mo comprÃ³ sus boletos para el festival?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿CÃ³mo comprÃ³ sus boletos para el festival?",
       x = "MÃ©todo de compra", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 2
ggplot(df3, aes(x = fct_infreq(`Â¿CuÃ¡ntos dÃ­as planea asistir al festival?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿CuÃ¡ntos dÃ­as planea asistir al festival?",
       x = "DÃ­as", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 3
ggplot(df3, aes(x = fct_infreq(`Â¿CuÃ¡l fue su presupuesto total para los boletos?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿CuÃ¡l fue su presupuesto total para los boletos?",
       x = "Presupuesto", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 4
ggplot(df3, aes(x = fct_infreq(`Â¿QuÃ© categorÃ­a de boletos comprÃ³?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿QuÃ© categorÃ­a de boletos comprÃ³?",
       x = "CategorÃ­a", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 5
ggplot(df3, aes(y = fct_infreq(`Â¿De quÃ© regiÃ³n o ciudad proviene?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿De quÃ© regiÃ³n o ciudad proviene?",
       x = "RegiÃ³n", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 6
ggplot(df3, aes(y = fct_infreq(`Â¿CuÃ¡l es su presupuesto estimado para alojamiento durante el festival?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿Presupuesto estimado para alojamiento?",
       x = "Presupuesto", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 7
ggplot(df3, aes(y = fct_infreq(`Â¿CuÃ¡nto planea gastar en alimentos y bebidas dentro del festival (por dÃ­a)?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿Gasto en alimentos y bebidas por dÃ­a?",
       x = "Monto", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 8
ggplot(df3, aes(y = fct_infreq(`Â¿CuÃ¡nto planea gastar en transporte por dÃ­a (incluye taxis, Uber, combustible, estacionamiento, etc.)?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿Gasto en transporte por dÃ­a?",
       x = "Monto", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 9
ggplot(df3, aes(y = fct_infreq(`Â¿QuÃ© otros gastos adicionales tiene planeado realizar? (Seleccione todas las que correspondan)`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿Gastos adicionales planeados?",
       x = "Gasto adicional", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 10
ggplot(df3, aes(x = fct_infreq(`Â¿Es la primera vez que asiste al festival Pal' Norte?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿Primera vez que asiste al festival?",
       x = "Respuesta", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 11
ggplot(df3, aes(x = fct_infreq(`Â¿CuÃ¡l es su rango de edad? (Pregunta demogrÃ¡fica)`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿CuÃ¡l es su rango de edad?",
       x = "Rango de edad", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# 12
ggplot(df3, aes(x = fct_infreq(`Â¿CuÃ¡l es su ocupaciÃ³n principal?`))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue",color = "black", alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Â¿CuÃ¡l es su ocupaciÃ³n principal?",
       x = "OcupaciÃ³n", y = "Frecuencia") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

```

##DF4 - GeoEspacial Municipal
### Normalidad
```{r}
df4 %>%
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "valor") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = valor)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "DistribuciÃ³n de Variables NumÃ©ricas", x = "Valor", y = "Frecuencia")
```

### CorrelaciÃ³n Variables
```{r}
df_num <- df4 %>% dplyr::select(where(is.numeric))
corr_matrix <- cor(df_num, use = "complete.obs")
corrplot(
  corr_matrix,
  method = "color",             
  type = "upper",               
  order = "hclust",              
  col = colorRampPalette(c("red", "white", "steelblue"))(200),
  addCoef.col = "black",         
  tl.col = "black",              
  tl.cex = 0.9,                  
  number.cex = 0.7,             
  diag = FALSE                  
)
```

```{r}
plot_normality(df_num)
```

```{r}
summary(df_num)
```


## DF5 - Google Maps
```{r}
gmaps_key <- 'AIzaSyDMtkIEvUpFccyUCGxLgXO-TzTcERfzJ3o'
register_google(key = gmaps_key) 
zmm_mty <- get_map("Monterrey, Nuevo LeÃ³n", zoom = 12)
```

```{r}
#leaflet() %>% 
  #addTiles() %>% 
  #setView(-100.31094, 25.66928, zoom = 14) %>% ### Mty downtown area
  #addMarkers(-100.31094, 25.66928, popup = "Monterrey Downtown Area")
```

```{r}
### Macroplaza
latitude  <- 25.669451729337776
longitude <- -100.30991297931254
r <- 15000
```

```{r}
search_str <- google_places(search_string = 'Plazas', location=c(latitude,longitude), radius=r, key=gmaps_key)
```

```{r}
search_str_add_one <- google_places(search_string = 'Plazas', location=c(latitude,longitude), radius=r, key=gmaps_key, page_token = search_str$next_page_token)
```

```{r}
search_str_add_two <- google_places(search_string = 'Plazas', location=c(latitude,longitude), radius=r, key=gmaps_key, page_token = search_str_add_one$next_page_token)
```

```{r}
business_name <- c(search_str$results$name, search_str_add_one$results$name, search_str_add_two$results$name)
business_rating <- c(search_str$results$rating, search_str_add_one$results$rating, search_str_add_two$results$rating)
user_ratings_total <- c(search_str$results$user_ratings_total, search_str_add_one$results$user_ratings_total,search_str_add_two$results$user_ratings_total)
place_id <- c(search_str$results$place_id, search_str_add_one$results$place_id, search_str_add_two$results$place_id)
lat <- c(search_str$results$geometry$location$lat, search_str_add_one$results$geometry$location$lat, search_str_add_two$results$geometry$location$lat)
lon <- c(search_str$results$geometry$location$lng, search_str_add_one$results$geometry$location$lng, search_str_add_two$results$geometry$location$lng)
```

```{r}
data_plazas <- data.frame(business_name,business_rating,user_ratings_total,place_id,lat,lon)
```

```{r}
search_str_2 <- google_places(search_string = 'Centro comercial', location=c(latitude,longitude), radius=r, key=gmaps_key)
```

```{r}
search_str_add_one_2 <- google_places(search_string = 'Centro comercial', location=c(latitude,longitude), radius=r, key=gmaps_key, page_token = search_str$next_page_token)
```

```{r}
search_str_add_two_2 <- google_places(search_string = 'Centro comercial', location=c(latitude,longitude), radius=r, key=gmaps_key, page_token = search_str_add_one$next_page_token)
```

```{r}
business_name_2 <- c(search_str_2$results$name, search_str_add_one_2$results$name, search_str_add_two_2$results$name)

business_rating_2 <- c(search_str$results$rating, search_str_add_one_2$results$rating, search_str_add_two_2$results$rating)

user_ratings_total_2 <- c(search_str_2$results$user_ratings_total, search_str_add_one_2$results$user_ratings_total,search_str_add_two_2$results$user_ratings_total)

place_id_2 <- c(search_str_2$results$place_id, search_str_add_one_2$results$place_id, search_str_add_two_2$results$place_id)

lat_2 <- c(search_str_2$results$geometry$location$lat, search_str_add_one_2$results$geometry$location$lat, search_str_add_two_2$results$geometry$location$lat)

lon_2 <- c(search_str_2$results$geometry$location$lng, search_str_add_one_2$results$geometry$location$lng, search_str_add_two_2$results$geometry$location$lng)
```

```{r}
data_centro_comercial <- data.frame(business_name_2,business_rating_2,user_ratings_total_2,place_id_2,lat_2,lon_2)
names(data_centro_comercial) <- c(
  "business_name", "business_rating", "user_ratings_total",
  "place_id", "lat", "lon"
)
```

```{r}
data_plazas_comerciales <- bind_rows(data_centro_comercial, data_plazas)
```


```{r}
plazas_top <- data.frame(
  Plaza = c(
    "Paseo San Pedro", "Fashion Drive", "GalerÃ­as Monterrey", "Esfera City Center",
    "Pueblo Serena", "Plaza Fiesta San AgustÃ­n", "Plaza Cumbres", "Paseo Comercial La Fe",
    "Plaza Fiesta AnÃ¡huac", "Nuevo Sur", "GalerÃ­as Valle Oriente", "Plaza Sendero San Roque",
    "Arboleda", "Punto Valle", "Plaza Auriga"
  ),
  Municipio = c(
    "San Pedro Garza GarcÃ­a", "San Pedro Garza GarcÃ­a", "Monterrey", "Monterrey",
    "Monterrey", "San Pedro Garza GarcÃ­a", "Monterrey", "San NicolÃ¡s de los Garza",
    "San NicolÃ¡s de los Garza", "Monterrey", "Monterrey", "Guadalupe",
    "San Pedro Garza GarcÃ­a", "San Pedro Garza GarcÃ­a", "San Pedro Garza GarcÃ­a"
  ),
  Latitud = c(
    25.65197795707379, 25.65161844565069, 25.68139299086823, 25.576266557661288,
    25.5773425721535, 25.64931304867253, 25.7319806318081, 25.72018932391338,
    25.74295334013345, 25.56361188596144, 25.638946293869246, 25.63862441500162,
    25.64951628334829, 25.65360034678157, 25.6480903966511
  ),
  Longitud = c(
    -100.35938657542624, -100.33570532487794, -100.35486901238367, -100.24468668284352,
    -100.2479307062595, -100.33651944659958, -100.39611314735431, -100.21896734439969,
    -100.31337920693532, -100.27562123813231, -100.3410836957911, -100.15540760992052,
    -100.35568966127931, -100.35846089322715, -100.33931482519715
  )
)
plazas_top

```


```{r}
plazas <- c(
  "Paseo San Pedro", "Fashion Drive", "GalerÃ­as Monterrey", "Esfera City Center",
  "Pueblo Serena", "Plaza Fiesta San AgustÃ­n", "Plaza Cumbres", "Paseo Comercial La Fe",
  "Plaza Fiesta AnÃ¡huac", "Nuevo Sur", "GalerÃ­as Valle Oriente", "Plaza Sendero San Roque",
  "Arboleda", "Punto Valle", "Plaza Auriga"
)


ubicacion_mty <- c(25.6695, -100.3099)
r <- 15000

buscar_plaza <- function(nombre) {
  res <- google_places(
    search_string = nombre,
    location = ubicacion_mty,
    radius = r,
    key = gmaps_key
  )
  
  if (length(res$results) == 0) return(NULL)  # si no encuentra nada

  tibble(
    nombre_busqueda = nombre,
    business_name = res$results$name[1],
    business_rating = res$results$rating[1],
    user_ratings_total = res$results$user_ratings_total[1],
    place_id = res$results$place_id[1],
    lat = res$results$geometry$location$lat[1],
    lon = res$results$geometry$location$lng[1]
  )
}

plazas_top_base <- map_dfr(plazas, buscar_plaza)
plazas_top_base <- plazas_top_base[, !names(plazas_top_base) %in% c("nombre_busqueda")]
```

```{r}
plazas_comerciales_zmm <- bind_rows(data_plazas_comerciales, plazas_top_base)
plazas_comerciales_sf <- st_as_sf(plazas_comerciales_zmm, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)
centros_comerciales_geo <- st_join(plazas_comerciales_sf, nuevo_leon_map["NOM_MUN"])
centros_comerciales_geo <- centros_comerciales_geo %>%
  distinct(business_name, .keep_all = TRUE)
```


## DF6 - Lugares Turisticos

```{r}
df6_filtrado <- df6 %>%
  filter(
    AÃ±o %in% c(2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024))
ggplot(df6_filtrado, aes(x = Fecha, y = Visitante, color = Lugar)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +  # â este faltaba
  labs(title = "Visitantes Lugares TurÃ­sticos",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2019â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "Miles de Visitantes",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60")
  )
```

```{r}
df6_filtrado_sin_pf <- df6_filtrado %>%
  filter(Lugar != "Vistantes Parque F.")
ggplot(df6_filtrado_sin_pf, aes(x = Fecha, y = Visitante, color = Lugar)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +  # â este faltaba
  labs(title = "Visitantes Lugares TurÃ­sticos",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2019â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "Miles de Visitantes",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60")
  )
```

# ESDA (I)
### Nuevo LeÃ³n

```{r}
tmap_mode("view")
```

```{r}
leaflet(data = nuevo_leon_map) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = "coral",
    weight = 1,
    color = "white",
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    label = ~NOM_MUN,
    highlight = highlightOptions(
      weight = 2,
      color = "#666",
      fillOpacity = 0.9,
      bringToFront = TRUE
    )
  )
```


```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
tm_shape(nuevo_leon_map) +
  tm_polygons(col = "lightgray", border.col = "white", lwd = 0.5) +
  tm_text("NOM_MUN", size = "AREA", auto.placement = TRUE) +
  tm_compass(position = c("left", "bottom")) +
  tm_layout(
    main.title = "Municipios de Nuevo LeÃ³n",
    title.size = 1.2,
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    asp = 0,
    bg.color = "white"
  )
```

### Plazas

```{r}
centros_comerciales_zmm <- centros_comerciales_geo %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(NOM_MUN) %>%
  rename(top_plazas_registradas = n)
ZMM_map <- ZMM_map %>%
  left_join(centros_comerciales_zmm, by = c("NOM_MUN" = "NOM_MUN"))
```

```{r}
zmm_plazas_map <- centros_comerciales_geo %>%
  mutate(
    Longitud = st_coordinates(.)[, 1],
    Latitud = st_coordinates(.)[, 2]
  )
```

```{r}
leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addHeatmap(data = zmm_plazas_map,
             lng = ~Longitud, lat = ~Latitud,
             blur = 20, max = 0.05, radius = 15,
             group = "Plazas")
```


### Lugares TurÃ­sticos
```{r}
df6_2019 <- df6 %>% filter(AÃ±o == 2019)
leaflet(df6_2019) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addHeatmap(
    lng = ~Longitud,  
    lat = ~Latitud,
    intensity = ~Visitante,
    blur = 20,
    radius = 15,
    max = 1
  )

df6_2020 <- df6 %>% filter(AÃ±o == 2020)
leaflet(df6_2020) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addHeatmap(
    lng = ~Longitud,  
    lat = ~Latitud,
    intensity = ~Visitante,
    blur = 20,
    radius = 15,
    max = 1
  )

df6_2021 <- df6 %>% filter(AÃ±o == 2021)
leaflet(df6_2021) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addHeatmap(
    lng = ~Longitud,  
    lat = ~Latitud,
    intensity = ~Visitante,
    blur = 20,
    radius = 15,
    max = 1
  )

df6_2022 <- df6 %>% filter(AÃ±o == 2022)
leaflet(df6_2022) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addHeatmap(
    lng = ~Longitud,  
    lat = ~Latitud,
    intensity = ~Visitante,
    blur = 20,
    radius = 15,
    max = 1
  )

df6_2023 <- df6 %>% filter(AÃ±o == 2023)
leaflet(df6_2023) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addHeatmap(
    lng = ~Longitud,  
    lat = ~Latitud,
    intensity = ~Visitante,
    blur = 20,
    radius = 15,
    max = 1
  )

df6_2024 <- df6 %>% filter(AÃ±o == 2024)
leaflet(df6_2024) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addHeatmap(
    lng = ~Longitud,  
    lat = ~Latitud,
    intensity = ~Visitante,
    blur = 20,
    radius = 15,
    max = 1
  )
```


# ANÃLISIS DE SENTIMIENTOS
```{r}
data_centros_comerciales <- centros_comerciales_geo
```

```{r}
data_centros_comerciales_top_ratings <- data_centros_comerciales %>% slice_max(business_rating, n = 10)
data_centros_comerciales_low_ratings <- data_centros_comerciales %>% slice_min(business_rating, n = 10)
```

### Reviews Plazas
```{r}
### Lets visualize the reviews information by coffee shop
top_ratings_plot <- ggplot(data_centros_comerciales_top_ratings, aes(x=reorder(business_name,business_rating), y=business_rating)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", fill="lightblue") + 
  labs(title="Hospitals - Top 10 Centros COmerciales", subtitle = "Zona Metropolitana de Monterrey") + 
  coord_flip()
top_ratings_plot
```

```{r}
ggplot(data_centros_comerciales_top_ratings, 
                           aes(x = reorder(business_name, business_rating), 
                               y = business_rating)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", width = 0.6) + 
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Centros Comerciales Mejor Calificados",
    subtitle = "Zona Metropolitana de Monterrey",
    x = NULL,
    y = "CalificaciÃ³n del Negocio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 0.5))
```

```{r}
top_reviews_plot <- ggplot(data_centros_comerciales_top_ratings, aes(x=reorder(business_name,user_ratings_total), y=user_ratings_total)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", fill="lightblue") +
  labs(title="Hospitals - Top 10 User Reviews", subtitle = "ZMM") + 
  coord_flip()
top_reviews_plot
```

```{r}
ggplot(data_centros_comerciales_top_ratings, 
       aes(x = reorder(business_name, user_ratings_total), 
           y = user_ratings_total)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", width = 0.6) + 
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Mejores Centros Comerciales",
    subtitle = "Zona Metropolitana de Monterrey",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total de ReseÃ±as"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma)
```


```{r}
low_users_plot <- ggplot(data_centros_comerciales_low_ratings, aes(x=reorder(business_name,business_rating), y=business_rating)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", fill="lightpink") + 
  labs(title="Hospitales - Lowest 10 User Ratings", subtitle = "ZMM") + 
  coord_flip()
low_users_plot
```
```{r}
ggplot(data_centros_comerciales_low_ratings, 
                           aes(x = reorder(business_name, business_rating), 
                               y = business_rating)) +
  geom_col(fill = "lightpink", width = 0.6) + 
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Centros Comerciales Peor Calificados",
    subtitle = "Zona Metropolitana de Monterrey",
    x = NULL,
    y = "CalificaciÃ³n del Negocio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5), breaks = seq(0, 5, 0.5))
```


```{r}
low_users_plot <- ggplot(data_centros_comerciales_low_ratings, aes(x=reorder(business_name,user_ratings_total), y=user_ratings_total)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", fill="lightpink")+ 
  labs(title="Hospitales - Lowest 10 Business Reviews", subtitle = "ZMM") + 
  coord_flip()
low_users_plot
```

```{r}
ggplot(data_centros_comerciales_low_ratings, 
       aes(x = reorder(business_name, user_ratings_total), 
           y = user_ratings_total)) +
  geom_col(fill = "lightpink", width = 0.6) + 
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Peores Centros Comerciales",
    subtitle = "Zona Metropolitana de Monterrey",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total de ReseÃ±as"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma)
```

### Reviews Texto Plazas
```{r}
reviews_top_ratings <- google_place_details(place_id = data_centros_comerciales_top_ratings$place_id[10], key = gmaps_key)
reviews_low_ratings <- google_place_details(place_id = data_centros_comerciales_low_ratings$place_id[10], key = gmaps_key)
```

```{r}
top_ratings_text  <- reviews_top_ratings$result$reviews$text
top_ratings_doc   <- Corpus(VectorSource(top_ratings_text))
low_ratings_text  <- reviews_low_ratings$result$reviews$text
low_ratings_doc   <- Corpus(VectorSource(low_ratings_text))
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
### Clean the text data
options(warn=-1)
top_ratings_doc <- top_ratings_doc %>% tm_map(removeNumbers) %>% tm_map(removePunctuation) %>% tm_map(stripWhitespace)
top_ratings_doc <- tm_map(top_ratings_doc, content_transformer(tolower))
top_ratings_doc <- tm_map(top_ratings_doc, removeWords, stopwords("english"))
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
options(warn=-1)
low_ratings_doc <- low_ratings_doc %>% tm_map(removeNumbers) %>% tm_map(removePunctuation) %>% tm_map(stripWhitespace)
low_ratings_doc <- tm_map(low_ratings_doc, content_transformer(tolower))
low_ratings_doc <- tm_map(low_ratings_doc, removeWords, stopwords("english"))
```

```{r}
### Lets create a dataframe containing each word in the first column and their frequency in the second column.
options(warn=-1)
dtm_top <- TermDocumentMatrix(top_ratings_doc) 
matrix_top <- as.matrix(dtm_top) 
words_top <- sort(rowSums(matrix_top),decreasing=TRUE) 
words_top_df <- data.frame(word = names(words_top),freq=words_top)
# write.csv(words_top_df, "D:\\CD2001C_AD2024\\Power_BI_Data_AD2024\\wordcloud_a.csv", row.names=TRUE)
```

```{r}
options(warn=-1)
dtm_low <- TermDocumentMatrix(low_ratings_doc) 
matrix_low <- as.matrix(dtm_low) 
words_low <- sort(rowSums(matrix_low),decreasing=TRUE) 
words_low_df <- data.frame(word = names(words_low),freq=words_low)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
### We can now generate the word cloud according to the top and low ratings reviews.
set.seed(1234) # for reproducibility 
### top ratings 
# top_raiting_wc<-wordcloud(words = words_top_df$word, freq = words_top_df$freq, min.freq = 1, max.words=200, random.order=FALSE, rot.per=0.35, colors=brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))
top_rating_wc <- wordcloud2(data = words_top_df, color = "random-dark", size = 0.6, shape = "circle")
top_rating_wc
### low ratings
#low_raiting_wc<-wordcloud(words = words_low_df$word, freq = words_low_df$freq, min.freq = 1, max.words=200, random.order=FALSE, rot.per=0.35, colors=brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))
low_rating_wc <- wordcloud2(data = words_low_df, color = "random-dark", size = 0.6, shape = "circle")
low_rating_wc
```

### Reviews Texto EspaÃ±ol
```{r}
## request more details about the restaurant using google_place_details()
plazas_reviews <- google_place_details(place_id = data_centros_comerciales$place_id[66], language = "es", key = "AIzaSyDMtkIEvUpFccyUCGxLgXO-TzTcERfzJ3o")
```


```{r, warning=FALSE}
### Based on google reviews lets generate a vector containing only the text.
### Corpus is a collection of written texts or a body of writing on a particular subject.
### Cleaning text data. 
plazas_reviews_text  <- plazas_reviews$result$reviews$text
plazas_reviews_doc   <- Corpus(VectorSource(plazas_reviews_text))   ### Tokenization: Break down the text into individual words or tokens. 
plazas_reviews_doc <- plazas_reviews_doc %>% tm_map(removeNumbers) %>% tm_map(removePunctuation) %>% tm_map(stripWhitespace)
plazas_reviews_doc <- tm_map(plazas_reviews_doc, content_transformer(tolower))
plazas_reviews_doc <- tm_map(plazas_reviews_doc, removeWords, stopwords("spanish"))
```

```{r}
dtm_plazas_reviews <- TermDocumentMatrix(plazas_reviews_doc) 
matrix <- as.matrix(dtm_plazas_reviews) 
words <- sort(rowSums(matrix),decreasing=TRUE) 
words_df <- data.frame(word = names(words),freq=words)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
### Word cloud of 50 hospitals around the starting point (Parque Fundidora)
### words with frequency below min.freq will not be plotted
# wordcloud(words = words_df$word, freq = words_df$freq, min.freq = 5, max.words=200, random.order=FALSE, rot.per=0.35, colors=brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))
```

```{r}
### Word clouds are a visual representation of text data where words are arranged in a cluster. The size of each word reflects its frequency or importance in the data set.
wordcloud2(data = words_df, color = "random-dark", size = 0.5, shape = "circle")
```


```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
### term matrix is a table containing the frequency of the words.
tdm_sparse <- TermDocumentMatrix(plazas_reviews_doc, control = list(weighting = weightTfIdf))
tdm_m_sparse <- as.matrix(tdm_sparse)
```

```{r}
# lets display frequency of words 
term_freq <- rowSums(tdm_m_sparse)
term_freq_sorted <- sort(term_freq, decreasing = TRUE)
tdm_d_sparse <- data.frame(word = names(term_freq_sorted), freq = term_freq_sorted)

# lets display the top 10 most frequent words
head(tdm_d_sparse, 10)
```

```{r}
# we create a word cloud to visualize the most frequent words in the google reviews
# wordcloud(words = tdm_d_sparse$word, freq = tdm_d_sparse$freq, min.freq = 4, max.words = 100, colors = brewer.pal(8, "Dark2"))
wordcloud2(data = tdm_d_sparse, color = "random-dark", size = 0.6, shape = "circle")
```

```{r}
# lets convert review column of dataframe to character vector so we can generate sentiment scores
text <- iconv(plazas_reviews_text)
```

```{r}
# Syuzhet method: It is an algorithm used to extract emotions from a sentence. It is a sentiment lexicon that can be used with non-English texts.
syuzhet_vector <- get_sentiment(text, method = "syuzhet") ### get_sentiment() function is used to analyze sentiment. 

# See first row of vector
head(syuzhet_vector)

# See summary statistics of vector
summary(syuzhet_vector)
```

#### SENTIMENT HISTOGRAM

```{r}
# Using the full dataset for sentiment analysis might still 
text_sampled <- iconv(plazas_reviews_text)
syuzhet_vector_sampled <- get_sentiment(text_sampled, method = "syuzhet")
```

```{r}
ggplot(data.frame(syuzhet_vector_sampled), aes(x = syuzhet_vector_sampled)) + 
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.1, fill = "blue", color = "black") + 
  labs(title = "Sentiment Distribution using Syuzhet Method (Sampled Data)", x = "Sentiment Score", y = "Frequency") + 
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
ggplot(data.frame(syuzhet_vector_sampled), aes(x = syuzhet_vector_sampled)) + 
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.1, fill = "#3182bd", color = "white", alpha = 0.9) +
  labs(
    title = "DistribuciÃ³n de Sentimientos (MÃ©todo Syuzhet)",
    subtitle = "Valores de sentimiento en muestra analizada",
    x = "Puntaje de Sentimiento",
    y = "Frecuencia"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "gray30"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray85"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```


#### BAR PLOT OF EMOTIONS

```{r}
nrc_sampled <- get_nrc_sentiment(text_sampled)    ### sentiment dictionary to calculate the presence of eight different emotions and their corresponding valence in a text file
nrct_sampled <- data.frame(t(nrc_sampled))
nrcs_sampled <- data.frame(rowSums(nrct_sampled))
nrcs_sampled <- cbind("sentiment" = rownames(nrcs_sampled), nrcs_sampled)
rownames(nrcs_sampled) <- NULL
names(nrcs_sampled)[1] <- "sentiment"
names(nrcs_sampled)[2] <- "frequency"
nrcs_sampled <- nrcs_sampled %>% mutate(percent = frequency/sum(frequency))
nrcs2_sampled <- nrcs_sampled[1:8, ]
colnames(nrcs2_sampled)[1] <- "emotion"
```

```{r}
### 1) The bar plot illustrating the distribution of emotions based on sentiment analysis using the NRC lexicon on the google reviews
### 2) Each bar represents a different emotion, and the height of the bar indicates the frequency of that emotion within the text data.
ggplot(nrcs2_sampled, aes(x = reorder(emotion, -frequency), y = frequency, fill = emotion)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  labs(title = "Emotion Distribution (Sampled Data)", x = "Emotion", y = "Frequency") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3")
```
```{r}
ggplot(nrcs2_sampled, aes(x = reorder(emotion, frequency), y = frequency, fill = emotion)) + 
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(
    title = "DistribuciÃ³n de Emociones Detectadas",
    subtitle = "Basado en datos muestreados con NRC Lexicon",
    x = "EmociÃ³n",
    y = "Frecuencia"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "gray20"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  )
```


#### BAR PLOT OF MOST POPULAR WORDS

```{r}
### 1) The output is a horizontal bar plot illustrating the frequency of the top 10 most popular words in the text data.
### 2) Each bar represents a word, and the length of the bar indicates the frequency of that word in the dataset. 
tdm_d_sparse <- tdm_d_sparse[1:10, ]
tdm_d_sparse$word <- reorder(tdm_d_sparse$word, tdm_d_sparse$freq)
ggplot(tdm_d_sparse, aes(x = word, y = freq, fill = word)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  coord_flip() + 
  labs(title = "Most Popular Words", x = "Word", y = "Frequency") + 
  theme_minimal()
```


#### PIE CHART OF SENTIMENT DISTRIBUTION

```{r}
# lets create a data frame with sentiment and count
sentiment_df <- data.frame(sentiment = c("Positive", "Negative", "Neutral"), count = c(sum(syuzhet_vector_sampled > 0), sum(syuzhet_vector_sampled < 0), sum(syuzhet_vector_sampled == 0)))
```

```{r}
# Create a pie chart
### 1) The output is a pie chart illustrating the distribution of sentiment categories within the dataset. 
### 2) Each segment of the pie chart represents a sentiment category (âPositiveâ, âNegativeâ, âNeutralâ), and the size of each segment corresponds to the count of that sentiment category in the dataset. 
ggplot(sentiment_df, aes(x = "", y = count, fill = sentiment)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
  coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
  labs(title = "Sentiment Distribution", x = "", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3")
```

```{r}
ggplot(sentiment_df, aes(x = "", y = count, fill = sentiment)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
  labs(
    title = "DistribuciÃ³n de Sentimientos",
    subtitle = "AnÃ¡lisis basado en texto muestreado",
    fill = "Sentimiento"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3")
```



# GENERACIÃN INDICADOR CLAVE
## Ingreso por turista
```{r}
df_IND <- df1 %>%
  filter(Fecha >= as.Date("2019-01-01")) %>%
  mutate(ingreso_por_turista = (DET * 1000000) / LLT_Total)
```

```{r}
ggplot(df_IND, aes(x = Fecha, y = ingreso_por_turista)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1f77b4", size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Ingreso por Turista",
       subtitle = "Serie mensual 2019â2024",
       x = "AÃ±o",
       y = "($) Pesos",
       caption = "Fuente: SecretarÃ­a de Turismo") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1, color = "gray60")
  )
```

```{r}
q1 <- quantile(df_IND$ingreso_por_turista, 0.25)
q2 <- median(df_IND$ingreso_por_turista)
q3 <- quantile(df_IND$ingreso_por_turista, 0.75)

df_IND$clasificacion_ingreso <- case_when(
  df_IND$ingreso_por_turista <= q1 ~ "Gasto Bajo (Riesgo)",
  df_IND$ingreso_por_turista > q1 & df_IND
  $ingreso_por_turista <= q3 ~ "Gasto Promedio (Mejora)",
  df_IND$ingreso_por_turista > q3 ~ "Gasto Alto (Oportunidad)"
)
```

```{r}
df_IND$clasificacion_ingreso <- factor(df_IND$clasificacion_ingreso,
                                     levels = c("Gasto Bajo (Riesgo)",
                                                "Gasto Promedio (Mejora)",
                                                "Gasto Alto (Oportunidad)"))

df_IND %>%
  group_by(clasificacion_ingreso) %>%
  summarise(
    ingreso_minimo = min(ingreso_por_turista, na.rm = TRUE),
    ingreso_maximo = max(ingreso_por_turista, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df_IND <- df_IND %>%
  mutate(clasificacion_ingreso = case_when(
    ingreso_por_turista <= 7758.548 ~ "Gasto Bajo (Riesgo)",
    ingreso_por_turista > 7758.548 & ingreso_por_turista <= 9644.197 ~ "Gasto Promedio (Mejora)",
    ingreso_por_turista > 9644.197 ~ "Gasto Alto (Oportunidad)"
  ))

rangos_ingreso <- data.frame(
  clasificacion_ingreso = c("Gasto Bajo (Riesgo)", "Gasto Promedio (Mejora)", "Gasto Alto (Oportunidad)"),
  ingreso_minimo = c(6645.255	, 7787.173, 9704.338),
  ingreso_maximo = c(7758.548, 9644.197, 11382.901),
  color = c("rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.2)",     
            "rgba(255, 255, 0, 0.2)",   
            "rgba(0, 128, 0, 0.2)")   
)

grafico_ingreso <- plot_ly()

for (i in 1:nrow(rangos_ingreso)) {
  grafico_ingreso <- add_trace(grafico_ingreso,
    x = c(min(df_IND$Fecha), max(df_IND$Fecha), max(df_IND$Fecha), min(df_IND$Fecha)),
    y = c(rangos_ingreso$ingreso_minimo[i], rangos_ingreso$ingreso_minimo[i],
          rangos_ingreso$ingreso_maximo[i], rangos_ingreso$ingreso_maximo[i]),
    type = 'scatter',
    mode = 'none',
    fill = 'toself',
    fillcolor = rangos_ingreso$color[i],
    line = list(color = 'transparent'),
    name = rangos_ingreso$clasificacion_ingreso[i],
    hoverinfo = "none",
    showlegend = TRUE
  )
}

grafico_ingreso <- add_trace(grafico_ingreso,
  data = df_IND,
  x = ~Fecha,
  y = ~ingreso_por_turista,
  type = 'scatter',
  mode = 'lines+markers',
  line = list(color = '#2ca02c'),
  marker = list(color = '#2ca02c'),
  name = "Ingreso por Turista",
  hoverinfo = 'text',
  text = ~paste("Fecha:", format(Fecha, "%b %Y"),
                "<br>Ingreso por Turista: $", round(ingreso_por_turista, 2),
                "<br>ClasificaciÃ³n:", clasificacion_ingreso)
)

grafico_ingreso <- layout(grafico_ingreso,
  title = list(text = "<b>Ingreso Promedio por Turista (Ãltimos aÃ±os)</b>"),
  xaxis = list(title = "Fecha"),
  yaxis = list(title = "Ingreso por Turista (MXN)"),
  hovermode = "closest"
)

grafico_ingreso
```
